targets.rawSql: SELECT error_code, COUNT(*) AS error_count FROM prusa_xl_error_events WHERE event_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY error_code ORDER BY error_count DESC
SELECT sample_time AS time, nozzle_temp_c AS value FROM prusa_xl_telemetry_samples WHERE $__timeFilter(sample_time) ORDER BY sample_time
SELECT sample_time AS time, bed_temp_c AS value FROM prusa_xl_telemetry_samples WHERE $__timeFilter(sample_time) ORDER BY sample_time
SELECT sample_time AS time, print_progress_pct AS value FROM prusa_xl_telemetry_samples WHERE $__timeFilter(sample_time) ORDER BY sample_time
SELECT date_trunc('minute', event_time) AS time, COUNT(*) AS value FROM prusa_xl_error_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT event_time, error_code, error_message, severity FROM prusa_xl_error_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT 50
